TICKET ENQUIRIES

For General Enquiries:

  • Email: tickets@celticfc.co.uk
  • Call: 0141 230 1967,  calls charged at standard rate.

TICKET OFFICE

  • The Ticket Office counter at Celtic Park is open 11am-2pm, Mon to Fri
  • Matchday opening hours are 11am - kick-off
